'''Hutt Chuba's''', or "Hutt Chuba'z" in [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]], was a restaurant in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was known for its [[Bantha blaster/Legends|Bantha blasters]] and the adjoining [[Foamwander Spa]], where [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] on Tatooine often congregated.

{{Loc-stub}}
